case_title: ALSTON'S JANITORIAL SVS, LLC VS. SLEEP TIGHT PEST CONTROL

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-13-2015 - JUDGMENT.

PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF. CLERK: M. GOODMAN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
